title: Bebeto Fizzy Watermelons (150g), Real Fruit Juice + No Artificial Colours + Halal Certified Sweets, Pack of 10, 1.5 kg
features: WATERMELON SWEETS: Treat your taste buds to our tantalisingly tangy Bebeto Watermelons, delicious fizzy gummy sweets packed with our signature watermelon flavour
description: Product Description At Bebeto We strive to provide only products that will exceed your expectations and will always satisfy you to the most. Ingredients Glucose syrup, sugar, apple juice from concentrate (7.5%), corn starch, beef gelatine, acidity regulator (citric acid), acids (tartaric acid, malic acid), flavouring, fruit and vegetable juice concentrates (apple, radish, blackcurrant, black carrot), fruit powder (watermelon (0.01% )), colours (copper complexes of chlorophyllins, lutein). May contain gluten. • None of our products contain lard or its derivatives. Manufacturer Contact Information Kervan Gida UK Ltd, Office 3, First Floor, Lakeside House, Quarry Lane, Chichester, PO19 8NY See more
